mapper.select: /* indvdl.cnsl.selectCnslQnaListByUser */ SELECT a.cnsl_sn AS CNSL_SN , a.cnsl_reqst_cn AS QUESTION , a.cnsl_rslt_cn AS ANSWER , a.cnsl_mthd_code AS CNSL_MTHD_CODE , a.cnsl_topic_code AS CNSL_TOPIC_CODE , a.cnsl_rlm_code AS CNSL_RLM_CODE , a.cnstnt_sn AS CNSTNT_SN , a.cnsl_rqstdt AS CNSL_RQSTDT , a.cnsl_compt_de AS CNSL_COMPT_DE FROM tn_cnsl_reqst_info a WHERE a.user_sn = #{userSn} AND a.cnsl_compt_at = 'Y' AND a.cnsl_rslt_cn IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.cnsl_rqstdt DESC
